if.test: (searchStartDt != null and searchStartDt != '' and searchEndDt != null and searchEndDt != '') or (pSearchGbn != null and pSearchGbn != '' and pSearchName != null and pSearchName != '')

mapper.select: /* RcpNewMgmtMapper.rcpNewMgmtList */

/* RcpNewMgmtMapper.getRateGrpByInfo */ SELECT DECODE(COUNT(B.RATE_CD),0,'N','Y') AS RATE_GRP_YN FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST A , MSP_RATE_GROUP_MAPP B WHERE A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0062' AND A.CD_VAL = 'RATE1016' AND A.CD_VAL = B.RATE_GRP_CD AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.RATE_CD = #{rateCd}
mapper.insert: /* RcpNewMgmtMapper.insertCopyRcpRequest */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,MANAGER_CODE ,AGENT_CODE ,SERVICE_TYPE ,OPER_TYPE ,CSTMR_TYPE ,RES_CODE ,RES_MSG ,RES_NO ,CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG ,CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG ,CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG ,CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG ,CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG ,CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG ,ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE ,ONLINE_AUTH_INFO ,PSTATE ,REQUEST_STATE_CODE ,OPEN_NO ,FILE01 ,FILE01_MASK ,FAXYN ,FAXNUM ,SCAN_ID ,ON_OFF_TYPE ,RIP ,OPEN_REQ_DATE ,SYS_RDATE ,REQ_WANT_NUMBER ,REQ_WANT_NUMBER2 ,REQ_WANT_NUMBER3 ,REQ_BUY_TYPE ,REQ_MODEL_NAME ,REQ_MODEL_COLOR ,REQ_PHONE_SN ,REQ_USIM_SN ,REQ_PAY_TYPE ,REQ_ADDITION ,SHOP_CD ,APP_FORM_YN ,REQ_IN_DAY ,CONTRACT_NUM ,ETC_SPECIAL ,REQ_USIM_NAME ,PHONE_PAYMENT ,REQ_ADDITION_PRICE ,APP_FORM_XML_YN ,SPC_CODE ,CNTPNT_SHOP_ID ,SHOP_USM_ID ,MEMO ,REC_YN ,OPEN_MARKET_REFERER ,SO_CD ,NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN ,APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN ,APP_CD ,SO_TRNS_AGRM_YN ,CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG ,SHOP_NM ,PROD_ID ,CRET_ID ,BANNER_CD ,SNTY_COLOR_CD ,SNTY_CAPAC_CD ,PROD_TYPE ,CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP ,CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR ,CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE ,CLAUSE_MPPS35_FLAG ,CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ,PROMOTION_CD ,REAL_SHOP_NM ,USIM_KINDS_CD /* SRM18072675707, 선택형 5종 단체보험 출시 관련 전산 프로세스 구축 */ ,INSR_CD ,CLAUSE_INSURANCE_FLAG /* 단말보험 */ ,INSR_PROD_CD ,CLAUSE_INSR_PROD_FLAG ,EID ,IMEI1 ,IMEI2 ,ESIM_PHONE_ID /* 20230718 자급제보상서비스 */ ,RWD_PROD_CD ,CLAUSE_RWD_FLAG /*20230817 마케팅동의 및 개인정보이용동의 항목 추가*/ ,PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE ,OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE ,OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE ,OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE ,HUB_ORDER_SEQ ,CLAUSE_SENSI_COLLECT_FLAG ,CLAUSE_SENSI_OFFER_FLAG ,CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_FLAG ,JEHU_PROD_TYPE ,OPEN_MARKET_ID ,JEHU_PARTNER_TYPE ,EVNT_CD_PRMT ,FATH_TRG_YN ,CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG ,FATH_TRANSAC_ID ,FATH_CMPLT_NTFY_DT ,CPNT_ID ,PRNTS_CONTRACT_NO ,COMBINE_SOLO_TYPE ,COMBINE_SOLO_FLAG ) SELECT #{requestKey } ,MANAGER_CODE ,AGENT_CODE ,SERVICE_TYPE ,OPER_TYPE ,CSTMR_TYPE ,RES_CODE ,RES_MSG ,#{resNo } ,CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG ,CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG ,CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG ,CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG ,CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG ,CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG ,ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE ,ONLINE_AUTH_INFO ,#{pstate } ,#{requestStateCode } ,OPEN_NO ,FILE01 ,FILE01_MASK ,FAXYN ,FAXNUM ,(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP0073' AND CD_VAL = A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID AND USG_YN = 'Y') THEN SCAN_ID ELSE '' END) AS SCAN_ID ,ON_OFF_TYPE ,#{rip } ,OPEN_REQ_DATE ,SYSDATE ,REQ_WANT_NUMBER ,REQ_WANT_NUMBER2 ,REQ_WANT_NUMBER3 ,REQ_BUY_TYPE ,REQ_MODEL_NAME ,REQ_MODEL_COLOR ,REQ_PHONE_SN ,REQ_USIM_SN ,REQ_PAY_TYPE ,REQ_ADDITION ,SHOP_CD ,APP_FORM_YN ,SYSDATE ,CONTRACT_NUM ,ETC_SPECIAL ,REQ_USIM_NAME ,PHONE_PAYMENT ,REQ_ADDITION_PRICE ,APP_FORM_XML_YN ,SPC_CODE ,CNTPNT_SHOP_ID ,#{shopUsmId} ,MEMO ,REC_YN ,OPEN_MARKET_REFERER ,SO_CD ,NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN ,APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN ,APP_CD ,SO_TRNS_AGRM_YN ,CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG ,SHOP_NM ,PROD_ID ,CRET_ID ,BANNER_CD ,SNTY_COLOR_CD ,SNTY_CAPAC_CD ,PROD_TYPE ,CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP ,CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR ,CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE ,CLAUSE_MPPS35_FLAG ,CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE ,PROMOTION_CD ,REAL_SHOP_NM ,USIM_KINDS_CD /* SRM18072675707, 선택형 5종 단체보험 출시 관련 전산 프로세스 구축 */ ,INSR_CD ,CLAUSE_INSURANCE_FLAG /* 단말보험 */ ,INSR_PROD_CD ,CLAUSE_INSR_PROD_FLAG ,EID ,IMEI1 ,IMEI2 ,ESIM_PHONE_ID /* 20230718 자급제보상서비스 */ ,RWD_PROD_CD /*20230817 마케팅동의 및 개인정보이용동의 항목 추가*/ ,CLAUSE_RWD_FLAG ,PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE ,OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE ,OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE ,OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE ,HUB_ORDER_SEQ ,CLAUSE_SENSI_COLLECT_FLAG ,CLAUSE_SENSI_OFFER_FLAG ,CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_FLAG ,JEHU_PROD_TYPE ,OPEN_MARKET_ID ,JEHU_PARTNER_TYPE ,EVNT_CD_PRMT ,FATH_TRG_YN ,CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG ,FATH_TRANSAC_ID ,FATH_CMPLT_NTFY_DT ,CPNT_ID ,PRNTS_CONTRACT_NO ,COMBINE_SOLO_TYPE ,COMBINE_SOLO_FLAG FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey}

/* RcpNewMgmtMapper.insertCopyRcpCustomer */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE ,CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME ,CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER ,CSTMR_TEL_FN ,CSTMR_TEL_MN ,CSTMR_TEL_RN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_FN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_MN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_RN ,FATH_MOBILE_FN ,FATH_MOBILE_MN ,FATH_MOBILE_RN ,CSTMR_POST ,CSTMR_ADDR ,CSTMR_ADDR_DTL ,CSTMR_ADDR_BJD ,CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE ,CSTMR_MAIL ,CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG ,CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM ,SYS_RDATE ,CSTMR_NAME ,CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH ,SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN ,SELF_CERT_TYPE ,SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT ,SELF_ISSU_NUM ,CSTMR_JEJU_ID ,SELF_CSTMR_CI ,RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD ,RECOMMEND_INFO ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{requestKey } ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE ,CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME ,CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN ,CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER ,CSTMR_TEL_FN ,CSTMR_TEL_MN ,CSTMR_TEL_RN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_FN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_MN ,CSTMR_MOBILE_RN ,FATH_MOBILE_FN ,FATH_MOBILE_MN ,FATH_MOBILE_RN ,CSTMR_POST ,CSTMR_ADDR ,CSTMR_ADDR_DTL ,CSTMR_ADDR_BJD ,CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE ,CSTMR_MAIL ,CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG ,CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM ,CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION ,OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM ,SYSDATE ,CSTMR_NAME ,CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH ,SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN ,SELF_CERT_TYPE ,SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT ,SELF_ISSU_NUM ,CSTMR_JEJU_ID ,SELF_CSTMR_CI ,RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD ,RECOMMEND_INFO ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey}

/* RcpNewMgmtMapper.insertCopyRcpSale */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP (MODEL_ID ,REQUEST_KEY ,MODEL_MONTHLY ,MODEL_INSTALLMENT ,MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE ,MODEL_PRICE_VAT ,RECYCLE_YN ,MODEL_DISCOUNT1 ,MODEL_DISCOUNT2 ,ENGG_MNTH_CNT ,SOC_CODE ,USIM_PRICE_TYPE ,JOIN_PRICE_TYPE ,JOIN_PRICE ,USIM_PRICE ,MODEL_PRICE ,ADDTION_SERVICE ,ADDTION_SERVICE_SUM ,MODEL_DISCOUNT3 ,USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD ,JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD ,REAL_MDL_INSTAMT ,SPRT_TP ,MAX_DISCOUNT3 ,DC_AMT ,ADD_DC_AMT ,SETTL_WAY_CD ,SETTL_AMT ,SETTL_APV_NO ,SETTL_TRA_NO ,OWN_PERSONAL_CODE ,RENTAL_BASE_AMT ,RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT ,RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT MODEL_ID ,#{requestKey } ,MODEL_MONTHLY ,MODEL_INSTALLMENT ,MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE ,MODEL_PRICE_VAT ,RECYCLE_YN ,MODEL_DISCOUNT1 ,MODEL_DISCOUNT2 ,ENGG_MNTH_CNT ,SOC_CODE ,USIM_PRICE_TYPE ,JOIN_PRICE_TYPE ,JOIN_PRICE ,USIM_PRICE ,MODEL_PRICE ,ADDTION_SERVICE ,ADDTION_SERVICE_SUM ,MODEL_DISCOUNT3 ,USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD ,JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD ,REAL_MDL_INSTAMT ,SPRT_TP ,MAX_DISCOUNT3 ,DC_AMT ,ADD_DC_AMT ,SETTL_WAY_CD ,SETTL_AMT ,SETTL_APV_NO ,SETTL_TRA_NO ,OWN_PERSONAL_CODE ,RENTAL_BASE_AMT ,RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT ,RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey}

/* RcpNewMgmtMapper.insertCopyRcpDelivery */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,DLVRY_NAME ,DLVRY_TEL_FN ,DLVRY_TEL_MN ,DLVRY_TEL_RN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_FN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_MN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_RN ,DLVRY_POST ,DLVRY_ADDR ,DLVRY_ADDR_DTL ,DLVRY_ADDR_BJD ,DLVRY_MEMO ,DLVRY_TYPE ,SYS_RDATE ,TB_CD ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{requestKey } ,DLVRY_NAME ,DLVRY_TEL_FN ,DLVRY_TEL_MN ,DLVRY_TEL_RN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_FN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_MN ,DLVRY_MOBILE_RN ,DLVRY_POST ,DLVRY_ADDR ,DLVRY_ADDR_DTL ,DLVRY_ADDR_BJD ,DLVRY_MEMO ,DLVRY_TYPE ,SYSDATE ,TB_CD ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey}

/* RcpNewMgmtMapper.insertCopyRcpReq */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,REQ_BANK ,REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME ,REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN ,REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION ,REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER ,REQ_CARD_NAME ,REQ_CARD_RRN ,REQ_CARD_COMPANY ,REQ_CARD_NO ,REQ_CARD_YY ,REQ_CARD_MM ,REQ_WIRE_TYPE ,SYS_RDATE ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_FN ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_RN ,PRNTS_BILL_NO ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{requestKey } ,REQ_BANK ,REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME ,REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN ,REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION ,REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER ,REQ_CARD_NAME ,REQ_CARD_RRN ,REQ_CARD_COMPANY ,REQ_CARD_NO ,REQ_CARD_YY ,REQ_CARD_MM ,REQ_WIRE_TYPE ,SYSDATE ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_FN ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN ,REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_RN ,PRNTS_BILL_NO ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey}

/* RcpNewMgmtMapper.insertCopyRcpMove */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,MOVE_COMPANY ,MOVE_MOBILE_FN ,MOVE_MOBILE_MN ,MOVE_MOBILE_RN ,MOVE_AUTH_TYPE ,MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER ,MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE ,MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT ,MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG ,SYS_RDATE ,REQ_GUIDE_FLAG ,REQ_GUIDE_FN ,REQ_GUIDE_RN ,REQ_GUIDE_MN ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ,OSST_PAY_DAY ,OSST_PAY_TYPE ,MOVE_PENALTY ) SELECT #{requestKey } ,MOVE_COMPANY ,MOVE_MOBILE_FN ,MOVE_MOBILE_MN ,MOVE_MOBILE_RN ,MOVE_AUTH_TYPE ,MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER ,MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE ,MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT ,MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG ,SYSDATE ,REQ_GUIDE_FLAG ,REQ_GUIDE_FN ,REQ_GUIDE_RN ,REQ_GUIDE_MN ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE ,OSST_PAY_DAY ,OSST_PAY_TYPE ,MOVE_PENALTY FROM MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey}

/* RcpNewMgmtMapper.insertCopyRcpPay */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,REQ_AC_TYPE ,REQ_AC01_BALANCE ,REQ_AC02_DAY ,REQ_AC01_AMOUNT ,REQ_AC02_AMOUNT ,SYS_RDATE ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{requestKey } ,REQ_AC_TYPE ,REQ_AC01_BALANCE ,REQ_AC02_DAY ,REQ_AC01_AMOUNT ,REQ_AC02_AMOUNT ,SYSDATE ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey}

/* RcpNewMgmtMapper.insertCopyRcpAgent */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,MINOR_AGENT_NAME ,MINOR_AGENT_RRN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN ,MINOR_AGENT_RELATION ,JRDCL_AGENT_NAME ,JRDCL_AGENT_RRN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN ,ENTRUST_REQ_NM ,ENTRUST_RES_NM ,ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION ,ENTRUST_RES_RRN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN ,SYS_RDATE ,MINOR_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN ,MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE ,MINOR_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT ,MINOR_SELF_ISSU_NUM ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{requestKey } ,MINOR_AGENT_NAME ,MINOR_AGENT_RRN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN ,MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN ,MINOR_AGENT_RELATION ,JRDCL_AGENT_NAME ,JRDCL_AGENT_RRN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN ,JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN ,ENTRUST_REQ_NM ,ENTRUST_RES_NM ,ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION ,ENTRUST_RES_RRN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN ,ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN ,SYSDATE ,MINOR_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN ,MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE ,MINOR_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT ,MINOR_SELF_ISSU_NUM ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey}

/* RcpNewMgmtMapper.insertCopyRcpAgent */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP (REQUEST_STATE_KEY ,REQUEST_STATE_CODE ,DLVRY_NO ,OPEN_NO ,MEMO ,SYS_RDATE ,RIP ,RID ,VIEW_FLAG ,RES_NO ,REQUEST_KEY ,TB_CD ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{statusKey} ,#{requestStateCode} ,null ,null ,MEMO ,SYSDATE ,#{rip} ,#{rid} ,VIEW_FLAG ,#{resNo} ,#{requestKey} ,TB_CD ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey} AND ROWNUM = 1

/* RcpNewMgmtMapper.insertCopyRcpChange */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP (NAME_CHANGE_NM ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN ,NAME_CHANGE_RRN ,NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT ,REQUEST_KEY ,SYS_RDATE ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT NAME_CHANGE_NM ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN ,NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN ,NAME_CHANGE_RRN ,NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT ,#{requestKey} ,SYSDATE ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey}

/* RcpNewMgmtMapper.insertCopyRcpDvcChg */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,DVC_CHG_TYPE ,DVC_CHG_RSN_CD ,DVC_CHG_RSN_DTL_CD ,REGST_DTTM ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT #{requestKey} ,DVC_CHG_TYPE ,DVC_CHG_RSN_CD ,DVC_CHG_RSN_DTL_CD ,SYSDATE ,#{sessionUserId} ,SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey}

/* RcpNewMgmtMapper.insertCopyRcpAddition */ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_ADDITION@DL_MCP (REQUEST_KEY ,ADDITION_KEY ,ADDITION_NAME ,RANTAL ) SELECT #{requestKey} ,ADDITION_KEY ,ADDITION_NAME ,RANTAL FROM MCP_REQUEST_ADDITION@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey}
mapper.select: /* RcpNewMgmtMapper.getOpenList */ SELECT FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0032', A.SERVICE_TYPE) AS serviceName /* 선후불_이름 */ ,A.RES_NO AS resNo /* 예약번호 */ ,A.SCAN_ID AS scanId /* 스캔 ID */ ,A.MEMO AS requestMemo /* 메모 */ ,B.CSTMR_NAME AS cstmrName /* 고객명 */ ,NVL( TRIM(B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN), '') AS cstmrForeignerRrn /* 외국인 등록번호 */ ,NVL( B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION, '') AS cstmrForeignerNation /* 외국인 국적 */ ,TRIM(B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN) || '-' || trim(B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN) || '-' || trim(B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN) AS cstmrMobile /* 휴대폰번호 */ ,CASE WHEN OOIM.ORGN_NM IS NOT NULL THEN OOIM.ORGN_NM || '/' || A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID WHEN A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011741' THEN 'M모바일(직영온라인)' || '/' || A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID WHEN A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011744' THEN 'M모바일(사내특판)' || '/' || A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID WHEN A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011745' THEN '총판(㈜프리피아)' || '/' || A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID ELSE ' ' END AS agentName /* 대리점 */ ,(SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = C.SOC_CODE AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS socName /* 요금제 */ ,(SELECT RATE_TYPE FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = C.SOC_CODE AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS prdtSctnCd ,(SELECT DATA_TYPE FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = C.SOC_CODE AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS prdtSctnCdName ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP9001' AND CD_VAL = A.OPER_TYPE) AS operName /* 업무구분 */ ,TO_CHAR(A.REQ_IN_DAY,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS reqInDay /* 신청일자 */ ,FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0006', A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE) AS requestStateName /* 진행상태 */ ,'' AS openReqDate /* 예약처리일자 */ ,DECODE(A.PSTATE,'00','정상','10','고객취소','20','관리자삭제') AS pstateName /* 신청서상태 */ /****************고객정보****************/ ,A.CSTMR_TYPE AS cstmrType /* 고객구분 */ ,A.SERVICE_TYPE AS serviceType /* 서비스구분 */ ,C.SOC_CODE AS socCode /* 요금제 코드 */ ,A.OPER_TYPE AS operType /* 업무구분 */ ,B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN AS cstmrForeignerPn /* 여권번호 */ ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS cstmrForeignerSdate ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS cstmrForeignerEdate ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS cstmrForeignerBirth ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYMMDD') AS cstmrForeignerBirth2 ,CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD AS cstmrForeignerDod ,B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME AS cstmrJuridicalCname /* 법인명 */ ,B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN AS cstmrJuridicalRrn /* 법인번호 */ ,SUBSTR(B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER,1,3) AS cstmrJuridicalNumber1 /* 법인사업자등록번호*/ ,SUBSTR(B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER,4,2) AS cstmrJuridicalNumber2 /* 법인사업자등록번호*/ ,SUBSTR(B.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER,6,5) AS cstmrJuridicalNumber3 /* 법인사업자등록번호*/ ,B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME AS cstmrPrivateCname /* 상호명 */ ,SUBSTR(B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER,1,3) AS cstmrPrivateNumber1 /* 개인사업자등록번호*/ ,SUBSTR(B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER,4,2) AS cstmrPrivateNumber2 /* 개인사업자등록번호*/ ,SUBSTR(B.CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER,6,5) AS cstmrPrivateNumber3 /* 개인사업자등록번호*/ ,B.CSTMR_MAIL AS cstmrMail ,B.CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG AS cstmrMailReceiveFlag /* 메일수신여부 */ ,B.CSTMR_ADDR AS cstmrAddr /* 고객정보_주소 */ ,B.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL AS cstmrAddrDtl /* 고객정보_상세주소 */ ,B.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE AS cstmrBillSendCode /* 고객정보_명세서종류*/ ,TRIM(B.CSTMR_TEL_FN) || '-' || TRIM(B.CSTMR_TEL_MN) || '-' || TRIM(B.CSTMR_TEL_RN) AS cstmrTel ,A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE AS onlineAuthType /* 온라인_인증방식 */ ,A.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO AS onlineAuthInfo /* 온라인_인증정보 */ ,A.PSTATE AS pstate /* 신청서_상태 */ ,A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE AS requestStateCode /* 가입진행_코드 */ ,A.ON_OFF_TYPE AS onOffType /* 온라인오프라인구분*/ ,FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0007', A.ON_OFF_TYPE) AS onOffName /* 모집유형*/ ,'' AS paperInfo /* 서식지정보 */ ,A.PHONE_PAYMENT AS phonePayment /* 휴대폰결제 */ /****************배송정보****************/ ,D.DLVRY_NAME AS dlvryName /*배송정보_이름*/ ,TRIM(D.DLVRY_TEL_FN) || '-' || TRIM(D.DLVRY_TEL_MN) || '-' || TRIM(D.DLVRY_TEL_RN) AS dlvryTel ,TRIM(D.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN) || '-' || TRIM(D.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN) || '-' || TRIM(D.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN) AS dlvryMobile ,D.DLVRY_ADDR AS dlvryAddr /*배송정보_주소*/ ,D.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL AS dlvryAddrDtl /*배송정보_상세주소*/ ,D.DLVRY_MEMO AS dlvryMemo /*배송정보_요청사항*/ /****************요금납부정보****************/ ,A.REQ_PAY_TYPE AS reqPayType /*요금납부방법*/ ,E.REQ_BANK AS reqBank /* 신청정보_계좌이체_은행*/ ,E.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER AS reqAccountNumber /* 신청정보_계좌이체_계좌번호*/ ,E.REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME AS reqAccountName /* 신청정보_계좌이체_예금주*/ ,E.REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN AS reqAccountRrn ,E.REQ_CARD_COMPANY AS reqCardCompany /*카드사*/ ,E.REQ_CARD_NO AS reqCardNo ,E.REQ_CARD_MM AS reqCardMm /*유효기간월*/ ,E.REQ_CARD_YY AS reqCardYy /*유효기간년*/ ,E.REQ_CARD_NAME AS reqCardName /* 신청정보_신용카드_명의자*/ ,E.REQ_CARD_RRN AS reqCardRrn /****************가입신청정보****************/ , A.REQ_BUY_TYPE AS reqBuyType /*구매유형*/ , A.REQ_MODEL_NAME AS prdtCode /*단말기모델코드*/ , MSPD.PRDT_ID AS prdtId /*단말기ID*/ , A.REQ_WANT_NUMBER AS reqWantNumber /*가입희망번호1*/ , A.REQ_WANT_NUMBER2 AS reqWantNumber2 /*가입희망번호2*/ , A.REQ_WANT_NUMBER3 AS reqWantNumber3 /*가입희망번호3*/ , translate(G.REQ_GUIDE_FLAG,'YN','10') AS reqGuideFlag /*신청정보_번호연결서비스_여부*/ , trim(G.REQ_GUIDE_FN) || '-' || trim(G.REQ_GUIDE_MN) || '-' || trim(G.REQ_GUIDE_RN) AS reqGuide , (case when INSTR(E.REQ_WIRE_TYPE,'AY')>0 then 1 else 0 end) AS reqWireType1 /*신청정보_무선데이터_이용_타입*/ , (case when INSTR(E.REQ_WIRE_TYPE,'AN')>0 then 1 else 0 end) AS reqWireType2 /*신청정보_무선데이터_이용_타입*/ , (case when INSTR(E.REQ_WIRE_TYPE,'DN')>0 then 1 else 0 end) AS reqWireType3 /*신청정보_무선데이터_이용_타입*/ /****************번호이동정보****************/ , trim(G.MOVE_MOBILE_FN) || '-' || trim(G.MOVE_MOBILE_MN) || '-' || trim(G.MOVE_MOBILE_RN) AS moveMobile , G.MOVE_COMPANY AS moveCompany /*번호이동정보_변경전통신사*/ , G.MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE AS moveThismonthPayType /*번호이동정보_이달사용요금납부방법*/ , G.MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT AS moveAllotmentStat /*번호이동정보_휴대폰_할부금상태*/ , G.MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG AS moveRefundAgreeFlag /*번호이동정보_미환급액요금상계동의_여부*/ , G.MOVE_AUTH_TYPE AS moveAuthType /*번호이동정보_인증유형*/ /****************법정대리인정보****************/ , H.MINOR_AGENT_NAME AS minorAgentName /*법인_대리인_성명*/ , H.MINOR_AGENT_RELATION AS minorAgentRelation /*미성년자_법정대리인_관계*/ , H.MINOR_AGENT_RRN AS minorAgentRrn , trim(H.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN) || '-' || trim(H.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN) || '-' || trim(H.MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN) AS minorAgentTel , A.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey /*가입신청키*/ , F.ADDITION_KEY AS additionKey /*부가서비스키*/ , F.ADDITION_NAME AS additionName /*부가서비스명*/ , A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID AS agentCode , A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID AS cntpntShopId , B.CSTMR_POST AS cstmrPost , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG,'Y',1,0) AS clausePriCollectFlag /*약관_개인정보_수집_동의 */ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG,'Y',1,0) AS clausePriOfferFlag /*약관_개인정보_제공_동의 */ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG,'Y',1,0) AS clauseEssCollectFlag /*약관_고유식별정보_수집이용제공_동의*/ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG,'Y',1,0) AS clausePriTrustFlag /*약관_개인정보_위탁_동의 */ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG,'Y',1,0) AS clausePriAdFlag /*약관_개인정보_광고전송_동의 */ , DECODE(A.CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG,'Y',1,0) AS clauseConfidenceFlag /*약관_신용정보_이용_동의 */ , A.REQ_USIM_SN AS reqUsimSn /*신청정보_USIM일련변호*/ , A.REQ_PHONE_SN AS reqPhoneSn /* 신청정보_휴대폰_일련번호*/ , TRANSLATE(NVL(OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG,'N'), '10','YN') AS othersPaymentAg /*타인납부*/ , SPC_CODE AS spcCode , D.DLVRY_POST AS dlvryPost , G.MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER AS moveAuthNumber , TRIM(B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN) AS cstmrNativeRrn ,'가입비 : ' || C.JOIN_PRICE || ' / 유심비 : ' || C.USIM_PRICE || (case when oper_type ='MNP3' then ' / ' || ' 번호이동 시 수수료 800원' end ) AS trmnlInfo , TRANSLATE(NVL(REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG,'N'), '10','YN') AS reqPayOtherFlag /*타인납부*/ , I.REQ_AC_TYPE AS reqAcType , C.MODEL_INSTALLMENT AS modelInstallment , C.REAL_MDL_INSTAMT AS realMdlInstamt /* 할부원금 */ , NVL(C.RECYCLE_YN, 'N') AS recycleYn , C.MODEL_DISCOUNT1 AS modelDiscount1 , C.MODEL_DISCOUNT2 AS modelDiscount2 /* 공시지원금 */ , C.MODEL_DISCOUNT3 AS modelDiscount3 /* 대리점지원금 */ , C.JOIN_PRICE AS joinPrice , C.USIM_PRICE AS usimPrice , C.MODEL_PRICE AS modelPrice , C.MODEL_PRICE_VAT AS modelPriceVat , NVL(C.MODEL_PRICE, 0) + NVL(C.MODEL_PRICE_VAT, 0) AS hndstAmt /* 출고가VAT포함 */ , NVL(C.MAX_DISCOUNT3, 0) AS maxDiscount3 /* 추가지원금(MAX) */ , NVL(C.DC_AMT, 0) AS dcAmt /* 할인금액 */ , NVL(C.ADD_DC_AMT, 0) AS addDcAmt /* 추가할인금액 */ , A.REQ_ADDITION_PRICE AS reqAdditionPrice , NVL(C.MODEL_MONTHLY, 0) AS instNom , NVL(A.SHOP_NM, NVL2(OOIM2.ORGN_NM, OOIM2.ORGN_NM || '/' || OOIM2.ORGN_ID, '')) AS shopNm , DECODE(CUM.USR_NM, NULL, '-', CUM.USR_NM || '/' || CUM.USR_ID) AS usrNm , I.REQ_AC01_BALANCE AS reqAc01Balance , I.REQ_AC02_DAY AS reqAc02Day ,(CASE WHEN I.REQ_AC_TYPE='01' THEN I.REQ_AC01_AMOUNT WHEN I.REQ_AC_TYPE='02' THEN I.REQ_AC02_AMOUNT END ) AS reqAcAmount , A.REQ_MODEL_COLOR AS reqModelColor , J.TB_CD AS tbCd , J.DLVRY_NO AS dlvryNo , A.MANAGER_CODE AS managerCode , MSPM.SALE_PLCY_CD AS salePlcyCd , MSPM.SALE_PLCY_NM AS salePlcyNm , A.FAXYN AS faxyn , A.FAXNUM AS faxnum , A.FAXNUM AS faxBySearch , C.MODEL_ID AS modelId , TO_CHAR(NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0)) AS agrmTrm , MSPD.MNFCT_ID AS mnfctId , A.REQ_MODEL_NAME AS reqModelName , A.REQ_USIM_NAME AS reqUsimName , DECODE(A.REC_YN, 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS recYn , A.OPEN_MARKET_REFERER AS openMarketReferer , DECODE(A.NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, 'Y', 1, 0) AS nwBlckAgrmYn , DECODE(A.APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, 'Y', 1, 0) AS appBlckAgrmYn , A.APP_CD AS appCd ,K.DVC_CHG_TYPE AS dvcChgType ,K.DVC_CHG_RSN_CD AS dvcChgRsnCd ,K.DVC_CHG_RSN_DTL_CD AS dvcChgRsnDtlCd ,C.USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD AS usimPayMthdCd ,C.JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD AS joinPayMthdCd /****************JEJU요금제관련정보****************/ ,DECODE(A.CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG,'Y',1,0) AS clauseJehuFlag /*약관_제휴서비스_동의*/ ,B.CSTMR_JEJU_ID AS cstmrJejuId ,C.SPRT_TP AS sprtTp ,NVL(A.PROD_TYPE, '01') AS prodType ,DECODE(A.CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP, 'Y', 1, 0) AS clauseRentalModelCp ,DECODE(A.CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR, 'Y', 1, 0) AS clauseRentalModelCpPr ,DECODE(A.CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE, 'Y', 1, 0) AS clauseRentalService ,C.RENTAL_BASE_AMT AS rentalBaseAmt ,C.RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT AS rentalBaseDcAmt ,C.RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT AS rentalModelCpAmt ,DECODE(A.CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG,'Y',1,0) AS clauseFinanceFlag FROM MSP_REQUEST A ,MSP_REQUEST_CSTMR B ,MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO C ,MSP_REQUEST_DLVRY D ,MSP_REQUEST_REQ E ,( SELECT REQUEST_KEY ,LISTAGG(ADDITION_KEY, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY ADDITION_KEY) ADDITION_KEY /*부가서비스_키*/ ,LISTAGG(ADDITION_NAME, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY ADDITION_NAME) ADDITION_NAME /*부가서비스_키*/ FROM MSP_REQUEST_ADDITION GROUP BY REQUEST_KEY ) F ,MSP_REQUEST_MOVE G ,MSP_REQUEST_AGENT H ,MSP_REQUEST_PAYMENT I ,MSP_REQUEST_DVC_CHG K ,ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST OOIM ,ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST OOIM2 ,CMN_USR_MST CUM ,MSP_SALE_PLCY_MST MSPM ,CMN_INTM_MDL MSPD ,(SELECT * FROM (SELECT /*+INDEX_DESC*/ ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY REQUEST_KEY ORDER BY REQUEST_STATE_KEY) ORD,REQUEST_KEY ,TB_CD,DLVRY_NO FROM MSP_REQUEST_STATE) WHERE ORD=1) J WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = E.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = F.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = G.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = H.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = I.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = J.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = K.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = OOIM.ORGN_ID(+) AND A.SHOP_CD = OOIM2.ORGN_ID(+) AND A.SHOP_USM_ID = CUM.USR_ID(+) AND C.MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE = MSPM.SALE_PLCY_CD(+) AND C.MODEL_ID = MSPD.PRDT_ID(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
SELECT CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(A.USER_SSN) AS userSsn FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

SELECT /* RcpNewMgmtMapper.getRcpPrmtList */ A.PROMOTION_CD AS promotionCd , A.PROMOTION_NM AS promotionNm , DECODE(#{operType}, 'NAC3', '신규', 'MNP3', '번호이동', '기존고객') AS joinTypeNm , DECODE(#{onOffType}, '0', '온라인', '1', '오프라인', '2', '홈쇼핑', '3', '모바일', '4', '고객센터') AS joinRouteNm , B.RATE_CD AS rateCd , C.RATE_NM AS rateNm , RTRIM(DECODE(A.BENEFIT_01, 'Y', '추가데이터제공,', '') || DECODE(A.BENEFIT_02, 'Y', '추가기본료할인,', '') || DECODE(A.BENEFIT_03, 'Y', '가입비면제,', '') || DECODE(A.BENEFIT_04, 'Y', '유심비면제,', ''), ',') AS benefitCmmt , #{agrmTrm} AS agrmTrm , #{operType} AS operType FROM MSP_PROMOTION_MST A , MSP_PRMT_RATE B , MSP_RATE_MST C , MSP_PRMT_ORGN D WHERE A.CNFM_YN = 'Y' AND A.PROMOTION_CD = B.PROMOTION_CD AND A.PROMOTION_CD = D.PROMOTION_CD AND B.RATE_CD = C.RATE_CD AND D.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} AND #{reqInDay} BETWEEN C.APPL_STRT_DT AND C.APPL_END_DT AND #{reqInDay} BETWEEN A.STRT_DT AND A.END_DT
AND DECODE(#{operType}, 'NAC3', NVL(A.JOIN_TYPE_01, 'N'), 'MNP3', NVL(A.JOIN_TYPE_02, 'N'), NVL(A.JOIN_TYPE_03, 'N')) = 'Y'
AND DECODE(#{onOffType}, '0', NVL(A.JOIN_ROUTE_00, 'N'), '1', NVL(A.JOIN_ROUTE_01, 'N'), '3', NVL(A.JOIN_ROUTE_03, 'N'), '4', NVL(A.JOIN_ROUTE_03, 'N'), 'N') = 'Y'
AND DECODE(#{agrmTrm}, '0', NVL(A.AGRM_TRM_0, 'N'), '12', NVL(A.AGRM_TRM_12, 'N'), '18', NVL(A.AGRM_TRM_18, 'N'), '24', NVL(A.AGRM_TRM_24, 'N'), '30', NVL(A.AGRM_TRM_30, 'N'), '36', NVL(A.AGRM_TRM_36, 'N'), 'N') = 'Y'
AND B.RATE_CD = #{rateCd}

SELECT DECODE(A.CD, NULL, '0', '1') AS chk ,B.CD_VAL AS bnftCd ,B.CD_DSC AS bnftNm FROM MCP_REQUEST_BENEFIT@DL_MCP A ,CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.CD(+) = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'RCP8000' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.REQUEST_KEY(+) = #{requestKey} ORDER BY B.ETC1
mapper.insert:
/* RcpNewMgmtMapper.insertRcpBenefit */
INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_BENEFIT@DL_MCP ( REQUEST_KEY, CD, CD_NM ) SELECT #{requestKey} AS REQUEST_KEY , A.BNFT_KEY , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP8000' AND CD_VAL = A.BNFT_KEY) AS BNFT_NAME FROM( SELECT SUBSTR(BNFT_KEY, DECODE(LEVEL, 1, 1, INSTR (BNFT_KEY, ',', 1, LEVEL - 1) + LENGTH (',')), DECODE(LEVEL, LENGTH(BNFT_KEY) - LENGTH(REPLACE (BNFT_KEY, ',', '')) + 1, LENGTH(BNFT_KEY) + LENGTH (','), INSTR (BNFT_KEY, ',', 1, LEVEL)) - DECODE (LEVEL, 1, 1, INSTR (BNFT_KEY, ',', 1, LEVEL - 1) + LENGTH (','))) AS BNFT_KEY FROM ( SELECT #{bnftKey} AS BNFT_KEY FROM DUAL) CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LENGTH (BNFT_KEY) - LENGTH (REPLACE (BNFT_KEY, ',', '')) + 1 ) A WHERE BNFT_KEY <> 'null'
mapper.select: /* RcpNewMgmtMapper.getSaleinfo */ SELECT A.PRDT_ID , A.RPRS_PRDT_ID , A.PRDT_NM , A.PRDT_CODE , B.OLD_YN , B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC AS MODEL_PRICE , TRUNC(B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC * 0.1) AS MODEL_PRICE_VAT , TRUNC(B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC * 1.1) AS HNDST_AMT , NVL(C.SUBSD_AMT, 0) AS SUBSD_AMT , TRUNC(DECODE(#{reqBuyType}, 'UU', 0, B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC * 1.1 - NVL(C.SUBSD_AMT, 0))) AS MODEL_INSTALLMENT , NVL(D.DC_AMT, 0) AS DC_AMT , DECODE(#{sprtTp}, 'KD', 0, 'SM', NVL(D.DC_AMT, 0), 'PM', NVL(D.DC_AMT, 0), 0) AS ADD_DC_AMT --, E.ETC2 AS USIM_PRICE --, E.ETC1 AS JOIN_PRICE , CASE WHEN A.PRDT_IND_CD = '10' THEN (SELECT ETC2 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE CD_VAL = #{operType}||'ESIM') ELSE E.ETC2 END AS USIM_PRICE , CASE WHEN A.PRDT_IND_CD = '10' THEN (SELECT ETC1 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE CD_VAL = #{operType}||'ESIM') ELSE E.ETC1 END AS JOIN_PRICE FROM CMN_INTM_MDL A , CMN_HNDST_AMT B , MSP_OFCL_SUBSD_MST C , MSP_RATE_SPEC D , CMN_GRP_CD_MST E WHERE A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = B.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND NVL(#{reqInDay}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') BETWEEN B.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM AND B.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM AND A.PRDT_ID = C.PRDT_ID(+) AND NVL(#{reqInDay}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) BETWEEN C.APPL_STRT_DT(+) AND C.APPL_END_DT(+) AND C.OPER_TYPE(+) = #{operType} AND C.OLD_YN(+) = 'N' AND C.AGRM_TRM(+) = #{agrmTrm} AND C.RATE_CD(+) = #{socCode} AND C.RATE_CD = D.RATE_CD(+) AND C.AGRM_TRM = D.AGRM_TRM(+) AND D.SPRT_TP(+) = #{sprtTp} AND NVL(#{reqInDay}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS') BETWEEN D.APPL_STRT_DTTM(+) AND D.APPL_END_DTTM(+) AND A.PRDT_ID = #{prdtId} AND E.GRP_ID = 'RCP0053' AND E.CD_VAL = #{operType} || (SELECT DATA_TYPE FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = #{socCode} AND ROWNUM = 1)
/* RcpNewMgmtMapper.getDvcChgAuthYn */ SELECT NVL(ETC1, 'N') AS authYn FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0003' AND CD_VAL = NVL(#{typeCd}, '30')
SELECT USG_YN FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0000' AND CD_VAL = 'RCPCHK'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MSP_RWD_ORDER ( RWD_SEQ , RWD_PROD_CD , RES_NO , REQUEST_KEY , CONTRACT_NUM , IF_TRGT_CD , CHN_CD , IMEI , IMEI_TWO , BUY_PRIC , FILE_ID , FILE_EXT , FILE_DIR , VRFY_RSLT_CD , VRFY_DTTM , VRFY_ID , RWD_AUTH_INFO , RMK , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM ) SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(RWD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, '0000'))) , RWD_PROD_CD , #{resNo} , #{requestKey} , CONTRACT_NUM , IF_TRGT_CD , CHN_CD , IMEI , IMEI_TWO , BUY_PRIC , FILE_ID , FILE_EXT , FILE_DIR , VRFY_RSLT_CD , VRFY_DTTM , VRFY_ID , RWD_AUTH_INFO , RMK , #{sessionUserId} , SYSDATE FROM MSP_RWD_ORDER WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey} AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey}) AND ROWNUM = 1

/* RcpNewMgmtMapper.insertGiftPrmtMPortalTrgt*/ INSERT INTO NMCP_GIFT_REQ_TXN@DL_MCP( GIFT_REQ_KEY,REQ_KEY,PROM_CD,GIFT_CD,GIFT_REQ_STTUS_CD ,GIFT_REQ_STTUS_DT,EVENT_CODE,QNTY,CRET_IP,CRET_DT ,CRET_ID,AMD_IP,AMD_DT,AMD_ID,PROM_DIV_CD ) SELECT SQ_GIFT_REQ_KEY.NEXTVAL@DL_MCP , #{requestKey} , PROM_CD , GIFT_CD , GIFT_REQ_STTUS_CD , SYSDATE , EVENT_CODE , QNTY , CRET_IP , SYSDATE , #{sessionUserId} , AMD_IP , AMD_DT , AMD_ID , PROM_DIV_CD FROM NMCP_GIFT_REQ_TXN@DL_MCP MPRT WHERE REQ_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey}
mapper.select: SELECT RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD FROM MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey}

/* rcpNewMgmtMapper.getCommendData */ SELECT LINK_TYPE_CD ,OPEN_MTHD_CD ,COMMEND_SOC_CODE_01 ,COMMEND_SOC_CODE_02 ,COMMEND_SOC_CODE_03 FROM MCP_COMMEND_ID_MNG@DL_MCP WHERE 1=1 AND COMMEND_ID = (SELECT DISTINCT RECOMMEND_INFO FROM MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey} AND RECOMMEND_INFO IS NOT NULL AND RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD = #{recommendFlagCd} )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_KT_INTER@DL_MCP ( RES_NO ,KT_INTER_SVC_NO ,CRET_ID ,SYS_RDATE )SELECT #{resNo} ,KT_INTER_SVC_NO , #{sessionUserId} , SYSDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_KT_INTER@DL_MCP WHERE RES_NO = (SELECT RES_NO FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{trgtRequestKey})
mapper.select: /*rcpNewMgmtMapper.getAcenPenaltyStatus*/ SELECT COUNT(REQUEST_KEY) FROM NMCP_ACEN_REQ@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY= #{requestKey} AND (EVNT_TYPE = 'MNP_NOSIM_02' OR EVNT_TYPE = 'MNP_SIM_02') AND END_STATUS = 'N' AND REQ_STATUS = 'N'
mapper.sql:
SELECT PAY.REQUEST_KEY /* 주문번호 */ , A.RES_NO /* 예약번호 */ , A.REQ_BUY_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9004', A.REQ_BUY_TYPE) AS REQ_BUY_NM /* 구매유형 */ , A.OPER_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0049', A.OPER_TYPE) AS OPER_NAME /* 업무구분 */ , A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE /* 진행상태코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0006', A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE) REQUEST_STATE_NAME /* 진행상태 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0005', A.PSTATE) AS PSTATE /* 신청취소OR신청상태*/ , TO_CHAR(A.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REQ_IN_DT /* 신청일자 */ , A.ON_OFF_TYPE /* 모집경로코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0007', NVL(A.ON_OFF_TYPE, '0')) ON_OFF_NM /* 모집경로 */ , DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', MDL.RPRS_PRDT_ID, '') AS PRDT_ID /* 제품ID */ , DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', MDL.PRDT_CODE, '') AS PRDT_CODE /* 단말모델명 */ , DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', MDL.PRDT_NM, '') AS MODEL_NAME /* 단말명 */ , DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', NVL(FN_GET_CODENM ('CMN0044', MDL.PRDT_COLR_CD), A.REQ_MODEL_COLOR), '') AS REQ_MODEL_COLOR /* 단말색상 */ , A.REQ_PHONE_SN /* 단말일련번호 */ , USIM.PRDT_CODE AS USIM_ID /* 유심제품명 */ , USIM.PRDT_NM AS USIM_NAME /* 유심모델 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP2035', A.USIM_KINDS_CD) AS USIM_KINDS_NM /* 유심종류 */ , A.REQ_USIM_SN /* 유심일련번호 */ , CASE WHEN MSD.REQ_USIM_SN IS NOT NULL THEN '직영온라인' ELSE FN_GET_ORGNM(PUM.ORGN_ID) END AS USIM_ORG_NM /*유심접점*/ , A.MEMO AS REQUEST_MEMO /* 메모 */ , C.SOC_CODE /* 가입요금제코드 */ , FN_GET_RATENM(C.SOC_CODE) AS SOC_NAME /* 가입요금제 */ , B.CSTMR_NAME /* 고객명 */ , B.CSTMR_TEL_FN /* 전화번호 앞자리 */ , B.CSTMR_TEL_MN /* 전화번호 중간자리 */ , B.CSTMR_TEL_RN /* 전화번호 뒷자리 */ , B.CSTMR_TEL_FN || B.CSTMR_TEL_MN || B.CSTMR_TEL_RN AS CSTMR_TEL /* 전화번호 */ , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN /* 휴대폰번호 앞자리 */ , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN /* 휴대폰번호 중간자리 */ , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN /* 휴대폰번호 뒷자리 */ , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN AS CSTMR_MOBILE /* 휴대폰번호 */ , B.CSTMR_POST /* 우편번호 */ , B.CSTMR_ADDR /* 주소 */ , B.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL /* 상세주소 */ , D.DLVRY_NAME /* 배송정보 이름 */ , D.DLVRY_TEL_FN /* 배송정보 전화번호 앞자리 */ , D.DLVRY_TEL_MN /* 배송정보 전화번호 중간자리 */ , D.DLVRY_TEL_RN /* 배송정보 전화번호 뒷자리 */ , D.DLVRY_TEL_FN || D.DLVRY_TEL_MN || D.DLVRY_TEL_RN AS DLVRY_TEL /* 배송정보 전화번호 */ , D.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN /* 배송정보 휴대폰번호 앞자리 */ , D.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN /* 배송정보 휴대폰번호 중간자리 */ , D.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN /* 배송정보 휴대폰번호 뒷자리 */ , D.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN || D.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN || D.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN AS DLVRY_MOBILE /* 배송정보 휴대폰번호 */ , D.DLVRY_POST /* 배송정보 우편번호 */ , D.DLVRY_ADDR /* 배송정보 주소 */ , D.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL /* 배송정보 상세주소 */ , D.DLVRY_ADDR || ' ' || D.DLVRY_ADDR_DTL AS FULL_DLVRY_ADDR /* 배송정보 전체주소 */ , D.DLVRY_MEMO /* 배송정보 요청사항 */ , E.TB_CD /* 택배사 */ , E.DLVRY_NO /* 송장번호 */ , TO_CHAR(NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0)) AS AGRM_TRM /* 약정개월수 */ , NVL(C.MODEL_MONTHLY, 0) AS INST_NOM /* 할부개월수 */ , NVL(C.MODEL_PRICE, 0) + NVL(C.MODEL_PRICE_VAT, 0) AS HNDST_AMT /* 출고가 */ , C.MODEL_DISCOUNT2 AS MODEL_DISCOUNT2 /* 공시지원금 */ , C.MODEL_DISCOUNT3 AS MODEL_DISCOUNT3 /* 추가지원금 */ , C.MODEL_INSTALLMENT AS MODEL_INSTALLMENT /* 할부원금 */ , FN_GET_USRNM(PAY.AMD_ID) AS AMD_NM /* 수정자*/ , TO_CHAR(PAY.AMD_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS AMD_DT /* 수정일시*/ , PAY.PAY_RST_CD /* 결제상태*/ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9027', PAY.PAY_RST_CD) AS PAY_RST_NM /* 결제상태*/ , PAY.CNCL_FAIL_RSN /* 결제취소 실패사유*/ , FN_GET_USRNM(PAY.CNCL_ID) AS CNCL_NM /* 결제취소자*/ , TO_CHAR(PAY.CNCL_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CNCL_DT /* 결제취소일시*/ FROM MCP_REQUEST_PAY_INFO@DL_MCP PAY , MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP B , MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP C , MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP D , MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP E , CMN_INTM_MDL MDL , CMN_INTM_MDL USIM , NMCP_USIM_BUY_TXN@DL_MCP MSD , MSP_PARTNER_USIM_MST PUM WHERE 1 = 1 AND PAY.REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY AND PAY.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND PAY.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND PAY.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY AND PAY.REQUEST_KEY = E.REQUEST_KEY AND C.MODEL_ID = MDL.PRDT_ID(+) AND A.REQ_USIM_NAME = USIM.PRDT_CODE(+) AND A.REQ_USIM_SN = MSD.REQ_USIM_SN(+) AND A.REQ_USIM_SN = PUM.USIM_NO(+)
AND A.REQ_IN_DAY BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchStartDt},'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt},'YYYYMMDD') + 1 /*신청일자*/
AND B.CSTMR_NAME LIKE #{searchVal} || '%' /*검색구분-고객명(pSearchGbn=1로 구분)*/
AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchVal} /*검색구분-계약번호(pSearchGbn=2로 구분)*/
AND (B.CSTMR_TEL_FN || B.CSTMR_TEL_MN || B.CSTMR_TEL_RN = TRANSLATE(#{searchVal},'1234567890-','1234567890') OR B.CSTMR_TEL_FN || B.CSTMR_TEL_MN || B.CSTMR_TEL_RN = TRANSLATE(#{searchVal},'1234567890-','1234567890')) /*검색구분-연락처(searchGbn=3로 구분)*/
AND A.REQ_PHONE_SN = #{searchVal} /*검색구분-단말기일련번호(pSearchGbn=4로 구분)*/
AND A.RES_NO = #{searchVal}/*검색구분-예약번호(pSearchGbn=5로 구분)*/
AND C.SOC_CODE IN ( SELECT RATE_CD FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND RATE_NM LIKE UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%' )/*검색구분-요금제(pSearchGbn=6로 구분)*/
AND DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', MDL.PRDT_CODE, '') LIKE #{searchVal} || '%'/*검색구분-단말모델명(pSearchGbn=7로 구분)*/
AND PAY.REQUEST_KEY = #{searchVal}/*검색구분-주문번호(pSearchGbn=8로 구분)*/
AND A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE = #{pRequestStateCode}
AND PAY.PAY_RST_CD = #{payRstCd}
AND A.PSTATE = #{pPstate}
AND A.OPER_TYPE = #{operType}
ORDER BY PAY.REQUEST_KEY DESC
mapper.select: /* RcpNewMgmtMapper.rcpMgmtPayFullList */

/*RcpNewMgmtMapper.getPartnerOfferType*/ SELECT EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'PartnerTerm' AND DTL_CD = #{agentCode} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND (PSTNG_START_DATE IS NULL OR PSTNG_END_DATE IS NULL OR SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))

SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey , A.RES_NO AS resNo , A.REQ_USIM_SN AS reqUsimSn , A.USIM_KINDS_CD AS usimKindsCd , A.OPER_TYPE AS operType , A.CSTMR_TYPE AS cstmrType , A.RVISN_ID AS rid , B.SOC_CODE AS socCode FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A ,MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP B ,MCP_UPLOAD_PHONE_INFO@DL_MCP C ,NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP D WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.UPLOAD_PHONE_SRL_NO = C.UPLOAD_PHONE_SRL_NO(+) AND A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = D.DTL_CD AND A.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND D.CD_GROUP_ID = 'AcenTargetAgent' AND A.CSTMR_TYPE = 'NA' AND (A.OPER_TYPE = 'NAC3' OR A.OPER_TYPE = 'MNP3') AND A.REQ_BUY_TYPE = 'UU' AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE IN ('0','3','6','8') AND B.SOC_CODE != 'KISOPMDSB' AND C.PRNTS_CONTRACT_NO IS NULL AND D.EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 = 'Y'
SELECT CD_VAL ,CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = #{grpId}
